grades.reason: Correctly routes all three branches (refund, order status, competitor decline) under 120 words, but 'please bear with me while I retrieve' is a mildly ceremonial phrase that edges toward narration.
Refuses legal escalation in one sentence and immediately routes the refund correctly, no preamble, no hedges, 51 words.
Picks the correct tier (carrier first, Acme escalation path second), no preamble, 76 words, adjacent help offered without padding.
